items.claim: Dion Barbosa possesses high-level grappling and jiu-jitsu skills.
items.quote: Dion Barbosza who has a very high level ground game, excellent jiu-jitsu skills

items.claim: Dion Barbosa is physically strong and capable of bullying opponents to the ground.
items.quote: she is very physically strong. Very, very physically strong. Can kind of bully you to the ground.

items.claim: Anna Melisano has clean, technical striking with good straight punches.
items.quote: her striking is very, very clean. Very, very clean. Good straight punches down the middle.

items.claim: Anna Melisano has shown vulnerability to being taken down and controlled in previous fights.
items.quote: we've seen in the past her, you know, get taken down, have some issues there

items.claim: Alvin Hines is coming off a suspension for a failed drug test.
items.quote: I believe Alvin Harris is coming off of a suspension, if I'm not mistaken, to where he popped.

items.claim: RJ Harris possesses significant one-shot knockout power.
items.quote: This guy's got power in his hands. He's got a good left hook, a big winging right hand

items.claim: RJ Harris has a dangerous standing guillotine submission.
items.quote: he's got a nasty standing guillotine.

items.claim: Alvin Hines is a well-rounded fighter with high-volume pressure and a solid ground game.
items.quote: He's dog tough. He's got crazy pace, good pressure, and a well-rounded game

items.claim: Alden Coria is a methodical striker who often fails to press for finishes.
items.quote: the one thing that does bug me a little bit with Cora is he doesn't press for the finish.

items.claim: Alden Coria has slick boxing and the ability to switch stances effectively.
items.quote: His boxing is slick. He can switch stances very, very well.
